2026-04-19T22:44:18.5497486Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5499485Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5500825Z 
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5501628Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5503735Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5505329Z 
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5505854Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5506666Z

2026-04-19T22:44:18.5507856Z 
2026-04-19T22:44:18.5508317Z   git switch -

2026-04-19T22:44:26.4203004Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-04-19T22:44:26.4232640Z http.https://github.com/.extraheader
2026-04-19T22:44:26.4272898Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --unset-all http.https://github.com/.extraheader
2026-04-19T22:44:26.4322548Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-04-19T22:44:26.4714911Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-04-19T22:44:26.4783035Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
2026-04-19T22:44:26.5268091Z Cleaning up orphan processes
2026-04-19T22:44:26.5547832Z ##[warning]Node.js 20 actions are deprecated. The following actions are running on Node.js 20 and may not work as expected: actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-python@v5. Actions will be forced to run with Node.js 24 by default starting June 2nd, 2026. Node.js 20 will be removed from the runner on September 16th, 2026. Please check if updated versions of these actions are available that support Node.js 24. To opt into Node.js 24 now, set the FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true environment variable on the runner or in your workflow file. Once Node.js 24 becomes the default, you can temporarily opt out by setting ACTIONS_ALLOW_USE_UNSECURE_NODE_VERSION=true. For more information see: https://github.blog/changelog/2025-09-19-deprecation-of-node-20-on-github-actions-runners/
